description:STRING: 'The classic home world represents a large country estate. There are two rooms
previewGIF:STRING: an outdoor space and an indoor room with windows.  The classic home is designed as a ready-to-use environment and has entry-point objects (these move avatars to their original spots on entering the rooms).'

description:STRING: 'The modern home world represents a contemporary house with views of the countryside. There are two rooms
previewGIF:STRING: an outdoor space and an interior space with windows.  The modern home is designed as a ready-to-use environment and has entry-point objects (these move avatars to their original spots upon entering the rooms).  Interesting objects include an outside water fountain
geometry:STRING: and a perpetual motion sculpture on the coffee table inside.'
